privileged_info_summary: The task involves two applications for candidate Sarah Connor for the Senior Developer position. One application is in the Refused stage and contains a note mentioning visa sponsorship. The agent must locate this note, copy it to the new application in the New stage, and archive the old application. All data is synthetically created during task setup via XML-RPC calls to a local Odoo instance.
